query:
SELECT oi.orderId, oi.productName, oi.quantity, oi.unitPrice, oi.lineTotal
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.orderId = o.id
WHERE o.orderNumber IN ('79', '83', '84')
ORDER BY o.id, oi.id;
